Bus Timings

F54 Bus Timetable Danube Metro Seaside to Mideast Metals and Return

January 11, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F54 is a vital transportation service operating in Jebel Ali, providing convenient connections between Danube Metro Seaside and Mideast Metals. It serves numerous stops within the Jebel Ali Free Zone and surrounding areas, making it a key option for commuters working in this industrial and commercial hub. The bus is known for its frequent service, catering to both morning and evening rush hours, and offering a reliable means of transport throughout the day.

Route Name F54
Route Description Danube Metro Seaside - Mideast Metals - Danube Metro Seaside
Total Distance Approximately 18-20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 44 minutes
Operational Hours 04:42 to 02:30 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website Official Website

Download PDF Bus F54

Bus F54 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The F54 operates from early morning until late at night, with buses departing approximately every 30 minutes. The detailed timings are as follows:

From Danube Metro Seaside From Mideast Metals

Bus F54 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for F54 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F54 is standard for Dubai’s public transport system. As of the latest updates, the fare is approximately AED 3. For accurate and up-to-date fare information, passengers are advised to check the official RTA Dubai website or consult with local ticketing information. Additionally, fare details are subject to change, so staying informed through official channels ensures you have the most current information before traveling.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus F54 does not require advance booking. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates on bus locations and schedules, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app, which provides live information on bus arrivals and departures. For convenience, it’s recommended to check the app before heading to the bus stop.

Bus Route

The route of Bus F54 includes the following stops:

  1. Danube Metro Seaside

  2. Donya Cinema

  3. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Training Center

  4. Customs Checking Area

  5. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 5

  6. Sony

  7. Roundabout 6

  8. Lease Office, 5

  9. Nafco

  10. Container Glass Factory

  11. Zaher Group

  12. Cleveland Bridge Engineering

  13. Cleveland Bridge Engineering, 2

  14. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 8

  15. Kanoo Group

  16. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 12

  17. Naboodah Cargo Centre

  18. EDGEN MURRAY Steel

  19. N300 Street

  20. DCFC Logistic

  21. N300 Roundabout, 13

  22. Inter Equipment Company

  23. Lucy Switchgear

  24. PharmaCare

  25. UAE Exchange Metro Seaside

  26. Globalink West Star Shipping Company

  27. PharmaCare

  28. Lucy Switchgear

  29. Inter Equipment Company

  30. Jebel Ali Free Zone, ENOC Petrol Station

  31. John Crane Middle East

  32. Transworld Group Of Companies

  33. CWT Logistics

  34. Freight Work

  35. Emmerson

  36. Jebel Ali Free Zone Authority South Accommodation

  37. Summit Steel

  38. Mideast Metals

Bus F54 Station Overview

Danube Metro Seaside

The Danube Metro Seaside station is a key stop for Bus F54, strategically located near the Danube Metro Station, which provides access to the adjacent seaside area. This station is well-equipped with essential amenities such as covered waiting areas and real-time schedule updates.

Its proximity to the metro station enhances connectivity and offers a convenient travel option for both daily commuters and visitors heading towards the seaside attractions. The station’s location supports efficient transfers between bus and metro services, making it a vital hub in the local transportation network.

Mideast Metals

he Mideast Metals station is another important stop for Bus F54, located close to the Mideast Metals industrial area. The station’s placement near an industrial zone ensures accessibility for those traveling to and from business and commercial sites in the area. Its facilities and location support a smooth transit experience, contributing to the overall efficiency of the local bus network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

1.

  1. Ibn Battuta Mall: Although not directly on the F54 route, it’s a major shopping and entertainment destination located nearby. It is one of the largest malls in Dubai and features a variety of shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Jebel Ali Village: This residential area has some local amenities and dining options that can be of interest to visitors.

  3. Dubai Marina: A bit farther from the F54 route, but worth noting for its vibrant nightlife, dining, and waterfront attractions.

These spots may require a short additional journey from the bus stops on the F54 route.

Journey Experience

Taking a trip on the F54 bus from Danube Metro Seaside to Mideast Metals offers a unique journey through the industrial and commercial hub of Jebel Ali. The long route takes you past key landmarks, including bustling warehouse districts and construction areas that define the rapid development of Dubai’s industrial sector.

Along the way, passengers will notice Jebel Ali’s blend of modern infrastructure and its proximity to Dubai’s busy port. While the route primarily caters to the workforce in the industrial zones, it also provides a fascinating glimpse into the backbone of the city’s economic growth. This journey showcases a different side of Dubai, far removed from its glittering skyline, offering insight into the industries that power the region.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily travel to Mideast Metals, the furthest point on the F54 bus route, starting from Danube Metro Seaside. The app provides a convenient way to arrange your trip, with the fare ranging from AED 44 to AED 53 depending on the specific location and time of day. Whether you’re commuting for business or exploring the area, Careem offers a reliable and efficient alternative to public transport, ensuring a comfortable journey to your destination.

For more information or assistance, you can visit the RTA Dubai website or contact their customer service center. Additionally, you can use the RTA Dubai app for real-time updates on bus schedules and routes. If you need help navigating the bus system or have specific inquiries, the customer service team is available to assist you. Public transport staff at major stations are also on hand to provide guidance and support.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 11, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
